title: rosa canina subsp. andegavensis
intro: Rosa canina subsp. andegavensis, also known as the Pyrenean dog rose, is a subspecies of the dog rose plant native to the Pyrenees mountains. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina subsp. andegavensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
